content: *도구, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 5 lbs **가치:** 1 GP --- **능력:** 민첩 {color="red"} **활용:** 나무에 패턴 새기기 (DC 10) {color="red"} **제작:** [곤봉](/212f7f5a1e80816db7aad12f932ac773?pvs=25), [대형 곤봉](/212f7f5a1e8081eebb90f0b0f3304dc6?pvs=25), [육척봉](/212f7f5a1e8081aa9c12cd3e70467b2b?pvs=25), 원거리 무기 ([권총](/212f7f5a1e8081689f0be96f9b28ec7e?pvs=25), [머스킷](/212f7f5a1e8081bfbf2ff1751ac36a1d?pvs=25), [무릿매](/212f7f5a1e80818da898c6af13b4dbc3?pvs=25) 제외), [비전 매개체](/212f7f5a1e8081a78d77cb0af1ab3f99?pvs=25), [화살](/165a87ea437781df9e5bd64d492ec4e0?pvs=25), [볼트](/165a87ea437781768105c3a02c67bb20?pvs=25), [드루이드 매개체](/212f7f5a1e808111a56ed45be5296930?pvs=25), [잉크 펜](/212f7f5a1e808169b206ce647700482f?pvs=25), [바늘](/1def7f5a1e8081e0894ae33ea0a6f908?pvs=25) {color="red"}
